prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Faint cold light rests on an upturned face crowned with thorns while the surrounding sky and edges sink into deep black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
A close view of the crucified Christ's face lifted toward a darkened sky, the mouth open in a single desolate cry, the brow furrowed beneath a crown of thorns, tear-tracked cheeks in faint light against deep black shadow, a fold of cream robe and the dark grain of the cross beam at the shoulder. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the lifted face crying out beneath the crown of thorns.

Cut to close-up — the open, crying mouth.

Cut to insert — the lifted, anguished eyes searching the dark.

Cut to insert — the crown of thorns on the brow.

Cut to insert — a tear track down the cheek.

Cut to macro detail — faint light on the strained throat.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the crying, upturned face.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Desolate, lonely anguish.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — lifted face crying out beneath the crown of thorns
Cut to close-up — the open crying mouth
Cut to insert — lifted anguished eyes searching the dark

Cut to macro detail — faint light on the strained throat
Return to full composition, end hold on the crying upturned face
